item.name: Serve the llms.txt autodiscovery file.

request.name: Serve the llms.txt autodiscovery file.

description.content: Serve the llms.txt autodiscovery file.

LLMtxt — agent-first document storage, compression, versioning, and multi-agent collaboration. Auth: Bearer API key (`Authorization: Bearer <key>`) or session cookie (`llmtxt_session`). Read routes on public documents are unauthenticated.

Contact Support:
 Name: LLMtxt Support
